characters.appearance: Young adult male, athletic build, light brown complexion. Dark curly mullet hair, dark eyes, wears small hoop earrings.
Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion. Blonde bob hair, blue eyes.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Stop saying: "I'm fine, thank you"
Character A says: "I don't know"
Character A says: "You are welcome"
Character A says: ये बहुत basic English है। [This is very basic English.]
Character A says: पहले मैं भी ऐसे ही बोलता था। [Earlier, I also used to speak like this.]
Character A says: फिर मैंने Supernova के साथ practice शुरू की। [Then I started practicing with Supernova.]
Character A says: Let me show you. [Let me show you.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by calling out common, overused English phrases.
- Relates to the user's struggle with basic English.
- Introduces Supernova as the solution and transitions to a demo.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
!! STOP SAYING !!
Stop saying: "I'm fine, thank you"
"I don't know"
"You are welcome"
ये बहुत basic English है
पहले मैं भी ऐसे ही बोलता था
फिर मैंने Supernova के साथ practice शुरू की
Let me show you

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Do you speak English? [Do you speak English?]
Character A says: हाँ, थोड़ी-थोड़ी। [Yes, a little bit.]
Character B says: Where are you from? [Where are you from?]
Character A says: I am belong to India. [I am belong to India.]
Character B says: Almost! Better say: "I am from India" या "I belong to India". [Almost! Better say: "I am from India" or "I belong to India".]
Character A says: Oh, मैं हमेशा इसमें confuse हो जाता हूँ। [Oh, I always get confused in this.]
Character B says: That's what I'm here for! आपकी English सही करने के लिए। [That's what I'm here for! To correct your English.]
Character A says: But private tutors तो बहुत महँगे होते हैं। [But private tutors are very expensive.]
Character B says: Supernova private tutor से बहुत affordable है। [Supernova is much more affordable than a private tutor.]
Character A says: Really? [Really?]
Character B says: बिलकुल! आप AI tutor के साथ real-world conversations practice कर सकते हैं। [Absolutely! You can practice real-world conversations with an AI tutor.]
Character A says: Like a real tutor? [Like a real tutor?]
Character B says: Yes, ये आपकी grammar और pronunciation ठीक करता है, ताकि आप confidence के साथ बोल सकें। [Yes, it corrects your grammar and pronunciation, so you can speak with confidence.]
Character A says: Okay, फिर मैं Supernova अभी download करता हूँ। [Okay, then I will download Supernova right now.]
Character B says: Great decision. Let's speak English together. [Great decision. Let's speak English together.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the AI tutor correcting a common Indian-English mistake in real-time.
- Addresses the cost objection by positioning Supernova as an affordable alternative to private tutors.
- Highlights key features: grammar correction, pronunciation, and building confidence.
